description_long: This bungalow features a simple, rectangular structure with horizontal wooden siding and a flat, overhanging roof. The front facade is dominated by large double glass doors framed in wood, providing ample natural light and a modern touch. One side of the building includes a solid wooden door and a double-pane window, while the opposite side has a single double-pane window. The rear of the bungalow is unadorned, with no windows or doors, emphasizing privacy. The base of the structure appears to rest on a brick or stone foundation, adding stability and a subtle contrast in texture. The overall design is minimalistic and functional, suitable for urban or suburban environments.
description: A modern, single-story wooden bungalow with a flat roof, large front glass doors, and minimalistic window placement. The structure is simple and functional, with horizontal wood siding and a brick foundation.
description_view_0: Side view showing a solid wooden door and a double-pane window set in horizontal wood siding.
description_view_1: Front view featuring large double glass doors framed in wood, serving as the main entrance.
description_view_2: Rear view with plain horizontal wood siding and no windows or doors, providing privacy.
description_view_3: Side view with a single double-pane window and horizontal wood siding.
